title: What is your Greatest Craziest tribute as fan of NGE
display_title: What is your Greatest Craziest tribute as fan of NGE
wikitext:
[]: What is your Greatest/Craziest tribute as fan of NGE?             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Fri Jun 19, 2009 12:59 am hey everybody, what is the Craziest and/or greatest tribute as a fan you ever did, or are currently doing, or has planned to do? you know, it can be anything! like attaching 200 NGE stickers to your lunchbox, or name your firstborn Baby Rei or Asuka, (but not Shinji as no one wants their son to be like him) or what the hell you came up with! just tell all the stuff! and if you can't decide what's your greatest/craziest tribute... then simply post everything!

[]:             Quote Post by scarmullet » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:02 am I have entire classroom lesson plans set up with viewing Evangelion in the class room in a plot analysis exercise in an English/Language Arts class room. (I am in the Teacher Prep program)

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:12 am I notify everyone of my kaworu fandom as frequently as possible :) it makes me happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Orphan Of Darkness » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:13 am No one here will believe this but...here we go anyway. Because we were young and jobless back in the day, we would make copies of the original dub tapes to share with people. Sometimes we'd just be watching them and recording them on another old tape just for the hell of it. I know this is pretty illegal but I swear we never sold them. We gave them to people to spread the word of "E" of course. So far, I think one of my better/crazier tributes has to be taking all the bootlegged tapes and putting them in other anime cases at our Blockbuster, leaving them in strange places like a park bench, VHS bins at the super markets video store, peoples lockers at school, giving them to randome people at school, etc. Some of them were unmarked, beat up old tapes which I imagine came off as pretty creepy. But most of them were labeled with stickers or white-out so it's all good. Just for the record, I did eventually buy all the VHS's and of course own the DVD's. EDIT: to prevent the American equivalent of Section 2 from violating me

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:21 am I was at a point where I was searching for an Evangelion man thong.

[]:             Quote Post by Fast Tony DeNiro » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:54 am Me and a friend celebrated Shinji and Asuka's birthdays in 2001. That's about it really. i_Love_Asuka wrote: (but not Shinji as no one wants their son to be like him)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:58 am Greatest -- my Asuka themed web pages Craziest -- herding cats on this board

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 19, 2009 2:47 am A veeeery long A/S fanfic I did about 3 years ago. The thing was about 48,000 words, which makes it pretty much the longest document I've ever written and completed. Just goes to show what happens where you are alone, bored, and obsessed with Evangelion. I was writing a sequel to it also, but I never finished it part of the story was set during Christmas season, and I missed my deadline for the remaining Christmas material two years in a row. Will this year be different? Maybe...

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Fri Jun 19, 2009 9:06 am Fuck the fans! Because of the crazy fans, I was certain that NGE was just fluffy soft-porn crap written for a bunch of total idiots. I remember reading a review for NGE and thinking that it sounded like a decent show, but then doing a web search and being turned off completely . If it wasn't for the idiotic fandom for this show, I would have seen it ten years ago! Thanks a lot, fans! I have done nothing for NGE fandom, and I'm damn proud of it!

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Jun 19, 2009 9:15 am Timstuff wrote: A veeeery long A/S fanfic I did about 3 years ago. The thing was about 48,000 words

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Jun 19, 2009 10:52 am For me it was long. It's nothing for most fanfic writers, but at the time I'd never written a story that had that much content. Yeah, I'm a pushover.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 19, 2009 11:15 am Greatest: Starting this forum. Craziest: STARTING THIS FORUM.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jun 19, 2009 11:27 am My craziest is in process. SPONGEBOB EVAPANTS

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Fri Jun 19, 2009 12:07 pm i honestly hoped someone would beat me... ok, time for me to tell! GREATEST (has been done): decorating my home with lotsies of Asuka and NGE (but primary Asuka), and no! not with pictures with what you think! just cute Asuka pictures, that's all. and no! it ain't THAT much, let's see *counting what is hanging on the walls* 4 posters A4 format, 1 giant poster i made by myself out of 8 A4-size posters (all containing Asuka) and one PVC figure of Asuka on my TV-shelf and 1 Revoltech Asuka figure wich i will place on top of my flatscreen tv. and a plate where i encased the 3 special edition cards of the platinum edition (and 2 more Asuka pictures) in glass so i could place them on my table. i think that's it... (more to come though) CRAZIEST (has been done): taking an extra part time job so i could afford myself the Platinum Edition DVD-box, all the Movie DVD's and the figures mentioned above AND the 2 complete Manga-series. and it was totally worth it! GREATEST (will be done): i am a proffesional Rallye-Driver (the correct word is Rallye-"PILOT" but most wouldn't get that) you know, like the WRC on tv. i have to start in the lower classes (you realy have to) but i already planned my next rallye-car when i finally may participate with the big cars. it will be a Dodge Charger (it will probably be the first Dodge Charger tuned for rallye competition EVER but i'm sure it will work, almost 600HP can't be wrong...) now the great thing! the Dodge will bear 2 Asuka artworks on it's sides! it's basic color is black so her red hair will be a real eyecatcher! CRAZIEST (will be done): trying to attach a picture of Asuka at the back of my girlfriends head during... you know what...

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Fri Jun 19, 2009 12:57 pm I plan on initiating third impact for a senior prank next year, but I will most likely end up dumping a few containers of Tang into our school's pool.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Fri Jun 19, 2009 1:33 pm Holy Diver wrote: I plan on initiating third impact for a senior prank next year, but I will most likely end up dumping a few containers of Tang into our school's pool.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Fri Jun 19, 2009 5:19 pm i_Love_Asuka wrote: i honestly hoped someone would beat me... ok, time for me to tell! GREATEST (has been done): decorating my home with lotsies of Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Fri Jun 19, 2009 5:35 pm Mr. Tines wrote: i_Love_Asuka wrote: i honestly hoped someone would beat me... ok, time for me to tell! GREATEST (has been done): decorating my home with lotsies of Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by HENRCAST » Fri Jun 19, 2009 5:39 pm Mr. Tines wrote: i_Love_Asuka wrote: i honestly hoped someone would beat me... ok, time for me to tell! GREATEST (has been done): decorating my home with lotsies of Asuka

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Fri Jun 19, 2009 6:19 pm Basically letting everyone I knew during high school borrow all of Evangelion. This probably was about 15 to 20 people.
